---
title: "Symbiont counts check"
author: "Jill Ashey"
date: "2026-04-06"
output: html_document
---

Checking manual sym count values vs guava counts

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Read in manual counts
```{r}
sym_manual <- read.csv("../data/Physiology/sym_counts/manual_sym_counts.csv", header = T)
```

Calculate cells per square cm
```{r}
blah <- sym_manual %>%
  dplyr::select(Colony_ID, Squares.Counted, matches("Count[0-9]")) %>%
  gather("rep", "count", -Colony_ID, -Squares.Counted)%>%
  group_by(Colony_ID, Squares.Counted) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(mean_count = mean(count, na.rm = TRUE))
```

Normalize count by homogenate vol and surface area 
```{r}
blah <- blah %>%
  mutate(cells.mL = mean_count * 10000 / Squares.Counted,
         cells = cells.mL * 50,
         cells.cm2 = cells / 15, 
         cells.cm2.M = cells.cm2 / 1e6)
```

Pretty high counts...need to compare to guava
